name: Slayer Of Terramorphous
description: Slayer Of Terramorphous is a legendary class mod set with variants for every Vault Hunter, including Gaige. It can drop from Terramorphous the Invincible, with the character type chosen at random. Compared with most legendary class mods, it trades slightly smaller skill boosts for a broader spread of extra bonuses such as survivability and damage-related stats.
notes:
Terramorphous always drops one, but the specific Vault Hunter version is random.

The Assassin variant was previously misassigned and later corrected.

Each character version uses different themed artwork; the Psycho one is notable for using a lowercase o in "of".

special.description:
At max level, Gaige's Slayer Of Terramorphous grants:
Burn Damage +37%
Ignite Chance +37%
Health +1,101,229
